text: The lights had gone out across the city for the third time this week, but most people still expected power to return by morning.
notes: Moderate G stress; partial S concern; not yet systemic collapse.

text: Armed factions controlled the highways, and the old government existed only as a rumor on fading radio channels.
notes: High P and S stress; E under severe strain; G secondary.

text: Despite the ruined fields, the coastal towns had begun to build seawalls and share what little food remained through a new council.
notes: High G and E stress but emerging agency and institutions.
